name: spec-sample-antora-preview
description: Local Antora preview tooling for this RISC-V specification. The PRODUCTION site is built by the central playbook (github.com/riscv-admin/antora.riscv.org), which supplies its own Antora, UI, extensions, and attributes. These devDependencies exist ONLY so `npm run preview` (antora antora-playbook.yml) renders locally the way production does -- diagrams via asciidoctor-kroki, math via @djencks/asciidoctor-mathjax. Keep the extension list in sync with antora-playbook.yml.
